examples.title: Euclidean Algorithm
examples.code:
FUNCTION gcd(a, b)
  WHILE b ≠ 0
    temp := b
    b := a mod b
    a := temp
  RETURN a
examples.explanation: Iteratively reduces problem size using modulus

examples.title: Miller-Rabin Primality Test
examples.code:
def is_prime(n, k=5):
    if n <= 1: return False
    s, d = 0, n-1
    while d % 2 == 0:
        s += 1
        d //= 2
    for _ in range(k):
        a = random.randint(2, n-2)
        x = pow(a, d, n)
        if x == 1 or x == n-1: continue
        for __ in range(s-1):
            x = pow(x, 2, n)
            if x == n-1: break
        else: return False
    return True
examples.explanation: Uses modular exponentiation and witness search
